timeline.title: Problem Scoping & EDA
timeline.desc: Explored the dataset, identified the 0.17% fraud rate, and decided AUC-ROC and Recall would be the primary metrics.

timeline.title: Feature Engineering
timeline.desc: Built 12 features on top of the 28 PCA columns: log-amount, z-score, hour-of-day, rolling velocity, and interaction terms.

timeline.title: Baseline Models
timeline.desc: Trained Logistic Regression and Random Forest as baselines. Random Forest was eliminated — 50-minute training time was unacceptable.

timeline.title: Candidate Models
timeline.desc: Evaluated LightGBM and XGBoost. LightGBM had higher raw recall; XGBoost was more stable across CV folds.

timeline.title: Optuna Hyperparameter Tuning
timeline.desc: Ran 30 Optuna TPE trials over 3.5 hours. Best CV AUC rose from 0.972 to 0.986. n_estimators, max_depth, and learning_rate were most sensitive.

timeline.title: MLflow Experiment Tracking
timeline.desc: Logged all runs, parameters, and artifacts to MLflow. Should have done this from Day 1 — several early runs had to be reconstructed.

timeline.title: Evaluation & Portfolio App
timeline.desc: Final evaluation suite, confusion matrix, feature importance analysis, and this Streamlit portfolio app.
